  1. Home
  2. Yard Letter and Number Signs

Yard Letter and Number Signs

Custom Letter and Number Signs for Events and Celebrations

Create unforgettable yard displays with custom letter and number signs from Banners.com. Perfect for any occasion, from welcoming loved ones home to celebrating milestones like anniversaries, graduations, and sports achievements. Our yard signs are made from durable, weather-resistant 4mm coroplast material, ensuring your message stays bright and bold in any condition.

Available in 18" tall letters and numbers, each sign can be customized with your choice of background templates and font styles. Whether you're spelling out a special message or supporting your favorite athlete, our yard signs are the perfect way to make a statement. Order today and turn your event into something truly memorable!

Alphabet Yard Letters
View Product
Happy Birthday Yard Letters
View Product
Numbers (0-9) Yard Letters
View Product

Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

What material are yard letters and numbers made from?

Our yard letters and numbers are printed on 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast)—a lightweight, durable material with hollow flutes for inserting metal stakes.

Are yard letter and number signs waterproof?

Yes—coroplast is waterproof and suitable for outdoor display. Because the signs are lightweight, we recommend bringing them inside during high winds.

What font styles are available for yard letters and numbers?

Choose from Capucine Basic Italic, Helvetica Neue Lt 85 Heavy, or Urbane Rounded Heavy.

Do you sell pre-made yard letter signs like “Happy Birthday”?

Yes—we offer pre-assembled yard letter sets (including “Happy Birthday”) in the same three font styles, with multiple colors and designs.

What size are the yard letters and numbers?

Each letter and number is 18 inches tall. Width varies by character and font style.

How do I order individual yard letters and numbers?

Go to the yard letters or yard numbers product page, choose your font and options, and add the characters you need to your order.

What are yard letters and numbers commonly used for?

They’re popular for birthdays, graduations, anniversaries, and holidays, plus business promotions, open houses, school spirit, and sports events.

 

Why Choose Banners.com?

Customer Service

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Fast Turnaround

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

 

Quality Products

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

Live Order Tracking

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
